title: lamium galeobdolon var. montanum
intro: Lamium galeobdolon var. montanum, also known as yellow archangel or wood betony, is a perennial plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly found in woodland areas of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Lamium galeobdolon var. montanum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
